evidence: Our ability to protect and enhance existing systems and develop new systems to keep pace with changes in information processing technology (including AI) will require our ongoing commitment of significant development and operational resources.
using our data, analytics and AI to provide clinicians with the information necessary to provide the best possible care in the most cost-efficient setting
We anticipate that fast-evolving AI technologies, including generative AI, will play an increasingly important role in our information systems and customer-facing technology products.

We increasingly rely on technologies powered by or incorporating AI in our internal operations and in the delivery of products and services... to improve efficiency, enhance customer experience, and optimize clinical and administrative processes.

new tools and products that leverage AI to improve the customer experience

techniques used to obtain unauthorized access... are increasing in sophistication, in part due to use of evolving AI technologies (including generative AI)... we may be unable to anticipate these techniques and threats
